message:
cleanup(time): remove dead next_id and generation fields from TimerDriver

These AtomicU64 fields were incremented in register() but their return
values were discarded (let _ =) and never read. The wheel already tracks
IDs and generations internally, as noted in the legacy comments.

Found during bd-2wds9 audit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
